form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 7th on April 5 over 510m at this track behind Lakeview Liam beaten 6 lengths (29.09) in a Grade 4/5. Unbeaten in two starts from this box. Key runner.

form.formComment: Won two starts back then raced on the pace last start when she finished 2nd on April 12 over 435m at this track behind Thunder Rose beaten 1.5 lengths (24.52) in a Grade 4. Goes well at this course, going well and can bounce back to winning form.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 435m at this track in a handy (24.57), beating Night Sharid. Will find this a bit tougher, others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Placed last time (24.60) at this track in a Free For All, finishing second and beaten 1.75 lengths. Has two wins and five placings from 11 starts from the draw. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 435m (24.42) beating Matilda Rose in Grade 4 on April 12. In form and expected to run well again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (24.24) over 425m at Bendigo. Has a wide draw to navigate and will need the right run to feature.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.24) at Warragul in a Mix 3/4, finishing seventh and beaten 10 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 510m. Last start finished last over 460m at Warragul beaten 6 lengths (26.35) behind Amron Sammy in a Grade 5 on April 14. Has clocked an exceptional 24.23 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.
